fn solve(nums: Vec<i64>, queries: Vec<Vec<i64>>) -> i64 {

    const MOD: i64 = 1_000_000_007;

    let n = nums.len();

    for query in queries {

        let li = query[0];

        let ri = query[1];

        let ki = query[2];

        let vi = query[3];

        let mut idx = li;

        while idx <= ri {

            let pos = idx as usize;

            nums[pos] = (nums[pos] * vi) % MOD;

            idx += ki;

        }

    }

    // compute XOR of all elements

    let mut xor = 0;

    for num in nums {

        xor ^= num;

    }

    xor

}
